SETCHANNEL_DESCRIPTION: Configure a voice channel for temporary channel creation
RESETCHANNEL_DESCRIPTION: Remove the configuration for a voice channel
RESETALLCHANNEL_DESCRIPTION: Remove all channel configurations on this server
SETWELCOME_DESCRIPTION: Configure the welcome message for new members
SETWELCOME_CHANNEL_OPTION: Channel where the welcome message will be posted
SETWELCOME_IMAGE_OPTION: Background image URL for the welcome card
SETWELCOME_ACTIVATED_OPTION: Enable or disable the welcome message
SETWELCOME_COLOR_OPTION: Hex color for the welcome card text
SETWELCOME_QUOTE_OPTION: Custom message shown on the welcome card
TESTWELCOME_DESCRIPTION: Preview the welcome message as if you just joined
SETLANGUAGE_DESCRIPTION: Set the language for this server
ARKAANS_DESCRIPTION: Get the invite link to the official Arkaans server
HELP_CMD_SETCHANNEL: Configure a voice channel to spawn temporary channels on join
HELP_CMD_RESETCHANNEL: Remove the configuration for a specific voice channel
HELP_CMD_RESETALLCHANNEL: Remove all channel configurations on this server
HELP_CMD_SETWELCOME: Set up the welcome message sent when a member joins
HELP_CMD_TESTWELCOME: Trigger the welcome message to preview it
HELP_CMD_ARKAANS: Get the invite link to the official Arkaans Discord server
RESETCHANNEL_NOT_FOUND: This channel has no configuration to remove.
RESETCHANNEL_CONFIRM_DESC: This will permanently remove the configuration for this channel.
RESETCHANNEL_SUCCESS_DESC: The channel configuration has been removed.
RESETALLCHANNEL_CONFIRM_DESC: This will permanently remove every channel configuration on this server.
RESETALLCHANNEL_SUCCESS_DESC: All channel configurations have been removed.
SETWELCOME_NO_CHANNEL: No welcome channel found. Please specify a channel.
ERROR_CMD: An error occurred while executing this command.
ERROR_MODAL: An error occurred while processing this form.
ERROR_BUTTON: An error occurred while processing this action.
ERROR_SETCHANNEL: An error occurred while saving the channel configuration.
ERROR_RESETCHANNEL: An error occurred while processing the channel reset.
ERROR_RESETALLCHANNEL: An error occurred while processing the reset.
